name: Rare Agent Work
description: Operator-grade AI research: reports on agent setup, multi-agent orchestration, and production architecture. Curated news feed and model leaderboard for agent builders.

nlweb_ask.description: NLWeb-compatible natural language query endpoint. Ask questions about AI models, agent news, and research reports in plain English.

parameters.prev: (POST) Comma-separated previous queries for multi-turn context

examples: GET /api/v1/ask?q=which model is best for tool use
POST /api/v1/ask {"query": "cheapest model for coding", "prev": "which model is best for tool use"}

models_leaderboard.description: Agentic model rankings by tool use, context recall, coding ability, and cost

news_feed.description: Curated daily AI agent news with tags, sources, and recency scoring

parameters.tag: Filter by tag (e.g., openai, security, open-source)

reports_catalog.description: Research report catalog with metadata, pricing, and preview content

rss_feed.description: RSS 2.0 feed of curated AI agent news

rate_limits.note: Public read-only endpoints. No API key required.

terms.usage: Free for programmatic access. Attribution appreciated. Do not redistribute full report content.
terms.data_license: Leaderboard scores and news metadata are freely usable with attribution.
